task_completion.description: Create a new tracking module named 'Space_Weather'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new module window, tab, or configuration dialog in Gpredict titled 'Space_Weather' is visible.

task_completion.description: Set the ground station for the module to 'Pittsburgh'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The module's configuration dialog or main view shows 'Pittsburgh' selected as the ground station.

task_completion.description: Add SUOMI NPP, NOAA 19, METOP-C, and GOES 16 to the module
task_completion.visual_evidence: The selected satellites list in the module configuration or the active tracking view displays SUOMI NPP (37849), NOAA 19 (33591), METOP-C (43689), and GOES 16 (41866).

task_completion.description: Configure the module to use the 'All views narrow' layout
task_completion.visual_evidence: The layout dropdown in the module configuration shows 'All views (narrow)' selected, or the active module displays the corresponding multi-pane narrow layout.

task_completion.description: Set the Map View ground track length to 3 orbits
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Map View settings or module configuration dialog shows the ground track length explicitly set to '3' orbits.

integrity.description: The agent used the Gpredict GUI to create and configure the module
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with Gpredict's graphical dialogs (e.g., 'New module', 'Module properties') rather than terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the GUI by manually editing configuration files
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of text editors (like nano, vim, or gedit) being used to manually write or edit the .mod configuration files.

integrity.description: The final result is displayed within the genuine Gpredict application
integrity.visual_evidence: The window decorations, UI elements, and layout match the standard Gpredict application, not a mock-up, image viewer, or web browser.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Required satellites: SUOMI NPP (NORAD 37849), NOAA 19 (NORAD 33591), METOP-C (NORAD 43689), and GOES 16 (NORAD 41866). The module name must be exactly 'Space_Weather'. The layout must be 'All views (narrow)'. The ground track length must be exactly 3 orbits.
